message:
fix(firecracker): clean up ZFS clone on CreateVM failure

When CreateVM fails after the ZFS clone is created but before success,
the clone was never cleaned up, leaking ZFS datasets. Added cleanup
calls to all error paths after the ZFS clone step.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
